name: mathtalking
description: MCP server for interactive math graphing, 3D scene building, and presentations. Plot functions (explicit, implicit, parametric, polar), build 3D scenes from 11 mesh shapes + 36 compound presets + mathematical surfaces z=f(x,y), and create slideshows. Returns interactive URLs with inline PNG thumbnails. Mathematically precise, not AI-generated. Zero install, browser-native.

tools.name: plot_graph
tools.description: Plot math functions, points, segments, labels, geometry, and shapes on an interactive graph. Auto-computes roots, extrema, and intersections. Supports gridStyle: 'polar'/'axes'/'none', theme: 'default'/'terminal'/'wallstreet'/'science'/'finance', and looping animations.

tools.name: plot_3d
tools.description: Create interactive 3D scenes with shapes, surfaces z=f(x,y), lights, particles, water, text3d (extruded 3D block letters, CJK supported), and 36 compound presets (buildings, vehicles, nature, furniture, characters). Color-driven building styles (red=Chinese, blue=modern, yellow=cozy, green=eco, brown=rustic). Returns interactive URL with inline PNG thumbnail. Supports animation (spin/bounce/orbit/waypoint/follow), physics, WASD player controls, and skybox presets.

tools.name: get_3d
tools.description: Retrieve the element list of an existing 3D render by ID. Use before base_render_id to inspect what a scene contains. Returns all elements with their properties.

tools.name: create_show
tools.description: Bundle multiple plot_graph results into a slideshow. Returns URL to an interactive presentation with prev/next navigation.
